descriptionHtml:
Fountaine Pajot Tanna 47 For Sale 2024 | 5 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

400 Engine Hours ONLY!!!

The Fountaine Pajot Tanna 47 For Sale 2024 is a modern sailing catamaran, built with comfort, practicality, and performance in mind. Currently offered in good condition, this 2024 model presents a strong opportunity for anyone seeking a newer catamaran, whether for family cruising, charter use, or long-distance coastal adventures.

Key Specifications

  • Year Built: 2024
  • Type: Catamaran, main sail - battened
  • Cabins: 5 double + 1 dedicated skipper cabin
  • Heads: 5
  • LOA (Length Overall): 13.94 m
  • Beam: 7.7 m
  • Draft: 1.2 m
  • Fuel Tank: 940 litres
  • Water Tank: 700 litres
  • Engines: 2 x Volvo Penta 60 hp (approx. 400 hours)
  • Generator: Onan 11KW
  • Air Conditioning: 65,000 BTU (6 x Webasto units)
  • Watermaker: Yes
  • Dinghy and Outboard: Yes
  • Tender Lift/Bathing Platform: Yes
  • Gangway: Yes
  • EPIRB (Emergency Position Indicating Radio Beacon): Yes
  • Electric Winch: Yes
  • Teak Deck: On flybridge and cockpit
  • Cabin Fans: Yes
  • Inverter: Yes
  • Fridge: 180 litres
  • Freezer: 90 litres
  • Plotter, Autopilot, GPS: Yes
  • Sound System: Radio, cockpit speakers, bluetooth
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Solar Panels: Yes
  • Saloon Shader: Yes

Condition and Summary

The Fountaine Pajot Tanna 47 For Sale 2024 is in good condition, reflecting a careful ownership approach with only moderate usage. This yacht is well-appointed with sought-after features and suited to a range of sailing plans, from short local cruises to longer passages.

For more information or to schedule your viewing, don't hesitate to contact us!
